name: GaugeFlow Gate A11-Q exact automorphism-quotient assignment v1
objective: Replace the prepared A11-S/Q Sinkhorn-first contract with an exact count-constrained assignment categorical law for the four-site InN/BN endpoint-ID type-only substrate gate. Q0 validates enumeration, residual automorphism actions and relabeling equivariance without training.

historical_evidence_is_immutable.instruction: A5 through A11.0 protocols, thresholds, reports, splits, checkpoints and conclusions remain immutable. This protocol does not edit, rerun or reinterpret them.

q0.condition: endpoint-ID only; no tensor condition, target composition, CIF row index, target species mapping, target CIF metadata, target lattice or target symmetry is input to a model
q0.composition: Counts are model-predicted in Q1; Q0 reads endpoint counts solely to enumerate and verify the likelihood support. It never exposes composition as a model input.

assignment_law.support: A(n) = all unique labeled-site assignments that exactly satisfy predicted species counts n; identical-species slots are not separately enumerated.
assignment_law.probability: p(Y) = exp(S(Y)) / sum_{Y_tilde in A(n)} exp(S(Y_tilde))
assignment_law.sampling: Categorical assignment sampling or assignment-level Gumbel-max. No independent node latent is added in this version.

automorphism_scope.production_rule: All Q1/Q2 production quotient calculations use only determinant-positive periodic automorphisms.
automorphism_scope.full_o3_diagnostic_only: full_o3_scalar is reported only to bound the identifiability of an O(3)-scalar decoder. Improper operations must never be silently included in a tensor-conditioned GaugeFlow quotient because a rank-three polar tensor retains parity information.
automorphism_scope.residual_group: Gamma_t = {gamma in Aut(X): gamma y_t = y_t}; masked and revealed chemical tokens are both part of y_t. Quotient labels are deduplicated before likelihood summation.

q0.neutral_q0_score_probe: All site-species scores are zero. Its uniform categorical law is a mathematical probe, not a learned prediction or a scientific endpoint-ID result.
required_checks: 2+2 support cardinality is exactly 6 unique chemical assignments
all assignments have exact composition counts
masked, partial-reveal and fully revealed residual group sizes are recorded
proper and full group quotient masses are reported separately
node relabeling maps the complete probability vector bijectively within the pre-registered FP32 threshold
assignment-level Gumbel-max samples preserve exact counts

q1.panel: InN/BN; endpoint-ID; type-only; fixed element-free periodic geometry; full 119-class vocabulary; model-generated composition
q1.fixed_cif_interpretation: A quotient accuracy near one with fixed-CIF accuracy near 0.5 can be correct removal of arbitrary CIF row labels, not a failure.

q2.requirement: Before tensor condition is restored, test a small material panel with distinct proper-SO(3) automorphism-orbit structures.

implementation_status.sinkhorn_and_hungarian: Retained and unit-tested as future large-N approximation/diagnostic components only; they do not participate in Q0 or Q1 scientific attribution.
